scenario.name: GenCall - Loop UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 102 INVITE User-Agent: teles Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 15 Allow: CANCEL,BYE,INVITE, ACK Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len] Accept: application/sdp
v=0 o=Dory 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 18 101 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

log.message: loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=400
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=403
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=404
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=408
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=410
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=480
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=484
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=486
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=487
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=488
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=500
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=503
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=600
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=fail final_code=603
loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=answer t_200ok_received=[clock_tick] final_code=200

scenario.send: ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 102 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "[field0]" <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 103 BYE Content-Length: 0

log.message: loop_uac direction=out call_id=[call_id] a_number=[field0] b_number=[field1] event=bye t_bye_sent=[clock_tick]
